## Elevated Capital Advisors Reduces Intel Stock Position

Routine institutional filing; no fundamental read-through. Worth tracking only as part of a broader pattern of institutional flows into or out of INTC as a proxy for turnaround conviction.

- A single institutional manager, Elevated Capital Advisors, disclosed a reduction in its INTC stake.
- No business, product, or strategic catalyst is cited; this is a routine regulatory filing disclosure.
- No thematic or macro signal attributed to the move.
